articles.title: Ethereum Activates 'Dencun' Upgrade, in Landmark Move to Reduce Data Fees
articles.description: A key element of the upgrade is to enable a new place for storing data on the blockchain – referred to as "proto-danksharding," which gives room for a dedicated space that is separate from regular transactions, and at a lower cost.

articles.title: Dencun Upgrade Goes Live, Ushering in New Era for Ethereum
articles.description: Developers say the upgrade will make transaction costs so low on layer-2 networks that gas fees might become a thing of the past.
